description: An extremely fast formatter and code style guide linter for JavaScript, TypeScript, JSX, and TSX

option.name: --check
tip: Check if files are formatted, also show statistics

option.name: --disable-nested-config
tip: Do not search for configuration files in subdirectories

option.name: --ignore-path
tip: Path to ignore file(s). Can be specified multiple times. If not specified, .gitignore and .prettierignore in the current directory are used.

option.name: --list-different
tip: List files that would be changed

option.name: --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern
tip: Do not exit with error when pattern is unmatched

option.name: --threads
tip: Number of threads to use. Set to 1 for using only 1 CPU core.

option.name: --with-node-modules
tip: Format code in node_modules directory (skipped by default)

option.name: --write
tip: Format and write files in place (default)
